reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +1,36 @@
 id: 01JMVIEW0000000000TGRID0
-name: ''
-kind: unknown
+name: Tasks Grid
+icon: table
+kind: grid
+entity_type: task
+card_fields:
+  - title
+  - tags
+  - assignees
+  - due
+  - position_column
+commands:

+      cua: Escape
